name: Monster Cookies # 2
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the eggs, margarine, sugar, brown sugar, peanut butter, and vanilla.
2. Gradually add the oatmeal, baking powder, chocolate chips, M&M candies, raisins, and chopped nuts to the mixture.
3. Drop heaping teaspoonfuls of dough onto slightly greased cookie sheets.
4. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 8 to 10 minutes.
5. Remove from oven and let cool on wire racks before serving.
